creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Updating lang/basic256 to 0.9.9.68

Fix: Apply the attached patch.

This new version adds a patch to remove the unused std namespace. That prevented the port from compiling in the build server.

Tested on redports:

https://redports.org/~fernape/20130929092701-57828-148092/basic256-0.9.9.68.log
https://redports.org/~fernape/20130929092701-57828-148093/basic256-0.9.9.68.log

Patch attached with submission follows:
